problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
mechanism: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site
hypothesis: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Small. Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
